grades.reason: Tries to satisfy all three branches simultaneously — return policy, order redirect, and competitor decline — producing the ceremonial multi-branch list the rubric marks as a failure.
Picks one tier cleanly: redirects order details to support, hard-refuses refund amounts and legal claims in two sentences, no preamble, 67 words.
Picks single tier (self-serve tracking first, then escalation path), no preamble, 55 words, no hedging.
